violations.text: The 3-bay sink and hand sink were observed in poor repair. Both were observed with leaks. Per PIC, leaks will be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3-bay sink until dishwasher is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The hand sink plumbing was observed with a leak and hand sink was draining into a bucket. System to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the lowboy and reach in refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
